'''âng-n-g''' ('''kanganag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ormolu|ormolu]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ormolu|ormolu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| kanganag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinganag|thinganag]] || [[word:jinganag|jinganag]] || [[word:shinganag|shinganag]] || [[word:kinganag|kinganag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunganag|thuthunganag]] || [[word:jujunganag|jujunganag]] || [[word:shushunganag|shushunganag]] || [[word:kukunganag|kukunganag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunganag|thunganag]] || [[word:junganag|junganag]] || [[word:shunganag|shunganag]] || [[word:kunganag|kunganag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunganag|thunganag]] || [[word:junganag|junganag]] || [[word:shunganag|shunganag]] || [[word:kunganag|kunganag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenganag|thenganag]] || [[word:jenganag|jenganag]] || [[word:shenganag|shenganag]] || [[word:kenganag|kenganag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonganag|thothonganag]] || [[word:jojonganag|jojonganag]] || [[word:shoshonganag|shoshonganag]] || [[word:kokonganag|kokonganag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonganag|thonganag]] || [[word:jonganag|jonganag]] || [[word:shonganag|shonganag]] || [[word:konganag|konganag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonganag|thonganag]] || [[word:jonganag|jonganag]] || [[word:shonganag|shonganag]] || [[word:konganag|konganag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnganag|thĂŠnganag]] || [[word:jĂŠnganag|jĂŠnganag]] || [[word:shĂŠnganag|shĂŠnganag]] || [[word:kĂŠnganag|kĂŠnganag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanganag|thathanganag]] || [[word:jajanganag|jajanganag]] || [[word:shashanganag|shashanganag]] || [[word:kakanganag|kakanganag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanganag|thanganag]] || [[word:janganag|janganag]] || [[word:shanganag|shanganag]] || [[word:kanganag|kanganag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanganag|thanganag]] || [[word:janganag|janganag]] || [[word:shanganag|shanganag]] || [[word:kanganag|kanganag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanganag|shanganag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanganag|goshanganag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanganag|gokishanganag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanganagnĂŒ|shanganagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanganagnknĂŒ|goshanganagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanganagnĂŒ|gokishanganagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanganagshĂ«|shanganagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanganagnkshĂ«|goshanganagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanganagshĂ«|gokishanganagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanganagro|shanganagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanganagnkro|goshanganagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanganagro|gokishanganagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanganagmu|shanganagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanganagnkmu|goshanganagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanganagmu|gokishanganagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanganagsher|shanganagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanganagnksher|goshanganagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanganagsher|gokishanganagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanganagng|shanganagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanganagnkng|goshanganagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanganagng|gokishanganagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanganagya|shanganagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanganagnkya|goshanganagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanganagya|gokishanganagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanganagyam|shanganagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanganagnkyam|goshanganagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanganagyam|gokishanganagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanganagnĂŒshĂ«|shanganagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanganagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanganagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanganagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanganagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanganagnĂŒro|shanganagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanganagnknĂŒro|goshanganagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanganagnĂŒro|gokishanganagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanganagnĂŒmu|shanganagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanganagnknĂŒmu|goshanganagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanganagnĂŒmu|gokishanganagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanganagshĂ«nĂŒ|shanganagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanganagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanganagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanganagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanganagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanganagshĂ«ro|shanganagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanganagnkshĂ«ro|goshanganagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanganagshĂ«ro|gokishanganagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanganagshĂ«mu|shanganagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanganagnkshĂ«mu|goshanganagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanganagshĂ«mu|gokishanganagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanganagronĂŒ|shanganagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanganagnkronĂŒ|goshanganagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanganagronĂŒ|gokishanganagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanganagroshĂ«|shanganagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanganagnkroshĂ«|goshanganagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanganagroshĂ«|gokishanganagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanganagromu|shanganagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanganagnkromu|goshanganagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanganagromu|gokishanganagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanganagmunĂŒ|shanganagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanganagnkmunĂŒ|goshanganagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanganagmunĂŒ|gokishanganagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanganagmushĂ«|shanganagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanganagnkmushĂ«|goshanganagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanganagmushĂ«|gokishanganagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanganagmuro|shanganagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanganagnkmuro|goshanganagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanganagmuro|gokishanganagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
